title: Google OAuth Login Success
description: Verify that users can log in successfully via Google OAuth and receive a valid JWT token with the correct user role assigned.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Click on the Google OAuth login button.
Authenticate using valid Google credentials linked to a user account.
User is redirected to the dashboard page.
JWT token is received and stored for session management.
User role (admin/facilitator/viewer) is assigned correctly based on user data.

title: Google OAuth Login Failure
description: Verify that login fails with invalid or revoked Google OAuth credentials and appropriate error message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Click on the Google OAuth login button.
Attempt login using invalid or revoked Google credentials.
Login fails and user remains on login page.
An appropriate error message indicating login failure is displayed.

title: Role-based Access Control Enforcement
description: Verify that role-based access control restricts unauthorized access to protected resources based on user roles.

steps.description: Log in as a viewer role user.
Attempt to access admin-only pages or perform admin-only actions.
Access is denied with a proper error or redirect to unauthorized message.
Repeat test logging in as facilitator and attempting admin-only actions.
Access is denied for unauthorized actions accordingly.

title: Dashboard Statistics Accuracy
description: Verify that the dashboard displays accurate statistics including total sessions, action items, average repeatability, and recent session activities.

steps.description: Log in as a user with valid data available.
Dashboard shows correct total number of sessions.
Dashboard shows correct total number of action items.
Average repeatability metric is correctly calculated and displayed.
Recent sessions list displays the latest sessions correctly sorted.

title: Session CRUD Operations
description: Verify the full lifecycle of session management including creating, reading, updating, searching/filtering, and deleting sessions with metadata and rating metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to sessions list page.
Create a new session with required metadata and ratings.
New session appears in the session list with correct data.
Use search and filter features to find the newly created session.
Session is correctly found and details shown.
Edit session metadata and rating metrics.
Changes are saved and reflected correctly in session details and list.
Delete the created session.
Session is removed from the list and database.

title: Google Sheets Survey Response Import
description: Verify the import functionality correctly fetches survey response data from Google Sheets API, groups responses by session ID, and calculates average ratings automatically.

steps.description: Provide a valid Google Sheets spreadsheet ID with survey response data.
Trigger the import process via the application UI.
Data is fetched from Google Sheets API successfully with no errors.
Responses are grouped correctly by session ID in backend.
Session rating averages are calculated accurately from the imported data.
Imported sessions and their rating metrics are updated or created in the database.

title: AI-powered Open-ended Question Analysis
description: Verify that the AI analysis service processes open-ended survey questions using GPT-4o and generates thematic analyses and common issues tables consistent with input data.

steps.description: Import survey response data containing open-ended questions.
Trigger AI analysis for one or more sessions via the application.
API calls to OpenAI GPT-4o are successfully made with correct input data.
Thematic analyses are generated and stored in the database.
Common issues tables display synthesized information based on AI output on session detail pages.

title: Session Ratings Calculation and Display
description: Verify the correct calculation and display of nine distinct session rating metrics including overall quality and repeatability on session detail views.

steps.description: Navigate to a session detail page with existing rating data.
All nine rating metrics are displayed clearly and correctly labeled.
Displayed rating values correspond to expected averaged or input values from data.
Update rating metrics for the session.
Ratings update successfully and persist after page reload.

title: Action Item Lifecycle Management
description: Verify the creation, editing, deletion, and tracking of action items including validations on priority, status, deadlines, and responsible assignees.

steps.description: Navigate to the action items management section.
Create an action item associated with a session, setting priority, status, deadline, and assignee.
Action item is created and listed with correct details.
Edit the action item to modify priority, status, deadline, and assignee.
Edits are saved and correctly reflected in the action items list.
Attempt to create or edit an action item with invalid or missing required fields.
Appropriate validation errors are shown preventing the operation.
Delete an existing action item.
Action item is removed from the list and database.

title: Facilitator Performance Reports Accuracy
description: Verify reports display accurate facilitator performance metrics and allow comparisons of session ratings over time.

steps.description: Navigate to the reports section as a facilitator or admin.
Facilitator performance metrics are displayed with correct data from sessions.
Select multiple sessions or apply filters to compare ratings across sessions.
Comparative metrics update correctly to reflect chosen sessions.
Reports match underlying session and rating data accurately.

title: Theme Toggle Persistence and Functionality
description: Verify the UI theme toggle switches correctly between light and dark modes and persists user preference across sessions.

steps.description: Locate and use the theme toggle control in the application UI.
Toggle from light to dark mode and vice versa.
UI styling updates immediately and consistently across all components.
Reload or close and reopen the browser/session.
Previously selected theme mode persists and UI renders accordingly.

title: API JWT Injection and Error Handling
description: Verify that API requests include JWT tokens in headers for authorization and handle error responses gracefully with proper messaging.

steps.description: Perform an authenticated API call to a protected endpoint.
JWT token is included in the Authorization header of the API request.
Simulate API call failure due to expired or invalid token.
Application redirects to login or displays an informed error message to the user.
Simulate network or server error for an API call.
Application handles the error gracefully with retry options or user notifications.

title: Database Schema and Migration Consistency
description: Verify the database schema aligns with SQLAlchemy models and migrations apply successfully without data loss or errors.

steps.description: Apply latest database migrations in a test environment.
Migrations complete successfully without errors.
Validate existence of tables: User, Session, SessionRating, QuestionAnalysis, CommonIssue, ActionItem.
Database structure matches defined models with correct relationships and constraints.
Perform basic CRUD operations on each model to confirm schema integrity.
Data manipulations persist correctly and constraints are enforced.

title: Session Search and Filtering
description: Verify search and filtering features on the session list page work correctly with various inputs and edge cases.

steps.description: Navigate to the sessions list page with multiple sessions available.
Use search bar to find sessions by name using exact and partial matches.
Search results correctly display matching sessions.
Apply different filters such as date range, rating thresholds, or metadata criteria.
Filtered results update accordingly reflecting the applied filters.
Attempt searches with special characters or empty queries.
Application handles edge cases gracefully without errors or crashes.

title: Layout Components Consistency
description: Verify navbar, sidebar, and loading spinner components render consistently across all pages and respond correctly to user interactions.

steps.description: Navigate across multiple application pages.
Navbar and sidebar appear consistently and contain expected links and controls.
Trigger data loading scenarios to display the loading spinner.
Loading spinner displays appropriately during loading phases and hides afterward.
Interact with navigation links in navbar and sidebar.
Navigation occurs correctly and UI updates as expected.
